or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_GWFND' and VERSION = '755' and not( (lpad(SP,4,'0')) < '0008' ) )
or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_GWFND' and VERSION = '756' and not( (lpad(SP,4,'0')) < '0006' ) )

or ( COMPONENT = 'SAP_GWFND' and VERSION = '758' and not( (lpad(SP,4,'0')) < '0002' ) )
)

checkitem.desc: [p3-CVSS 4.3] [CVE-2026-44749] OPU-GW-V4 - Note 0003433366 missing and applicable using Correction Instruction

)

checkitem.desc: [p3-CVSS 4.2] [CVE-2026-24315] CA-FLP-FE-COR - SAPUI5 library patch required for SNote 3682699v12
checkitem.compliant: ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,5) = '1.38.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.38.'),4,'0') >= '0068' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,5) = '1.71.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.71.'),4,'0') >= '0082' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,5) = '1.96.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.96.'),4,'0') >= '0048' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.108.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.108.'),4,'0') >= '0052' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.120.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.120.'),4,'0') >= '0045' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.136.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.136.'),4,'0') >= '0017' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.142.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.142.'),4,'0') >= '0009' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.145.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.145.'),4,'0') >= '0002' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and lpad(SUBSTRING(VALUE, LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1, (IFNULL(NULLIF(LOCATE(VALUE, '.', LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1), 0), LENGTH(VALUE)+1) - LOCATE(VALUE, '.') - 1)), 3, '0') >= '146' )
checkitem.noncompliant: ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,5) = '1.38.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.38.'),4,'0') < '0068' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,5) = '1.71.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.71.'),4,'0') < '0082' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,5) = '1.96.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.96.'),4,'0') < '0048' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.108.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.108.'),4,'0') < '0052' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.120.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.120.'),4,'0') < '0045' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.136.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.136.'),4,'0') < '0017' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.142.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.142.'),4,'0') < '0009' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and substring(VALUE,0,6) = '1.145.' and lpad(substr_after(VALUE,'1.145.'),4,'0') < '0002' ) or ( name = 'VERSION' and lpad(SUBSTRING(VALUE, LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1, (IFNULL(NULLIF(LOCATE(VALUE, '.', LOCATE(VALUE, '.')+1), 0), LENGTH(VALUE)+1) - LOCATE(VALUE, '.') - 1)), 3, '0') < '038' )
